NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-26-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-08-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-25-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CESAR HERNANDEZ' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES IS DENIED. CIVIL CODE SECTION 1717.5, WHICH IN EFFECT SUPPLIES A CONTRACTUAL PREVAILING PARTY ATTORNEY FEE CLAUSE FOR CASES BASED ON AN OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT, IS BEST READ IN CONCERT WITH THE RULES GOVERNING ATTORNEY FEE AWARDS IN CONTRACT CASES. SECTION 1717(B)(2) STATES THAT THERE IS NO PREVAILING PARTY IN A CONTRACT ACTION THAT IS DISMISSED OR SETTLED BEFORE TRIAL, AS THIS ACTION WAS. SECTION 1717.5 TREATS OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT CASES AS CONTRACT CASES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: LESLIE C. calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CESAR HERNANDEZ' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES IS Denied. Civil Code section 1717.5, which in effect supplies a contractual prevailing party attorney fee clause for cases based on an open book account, is best read in concert with the rules governing attorney fee awards in contract cases. Section 1717(b)(2) states that there is no prevailing party in a contract action that is dismissed or settled before trial, as this action was. Section 1717.5 treats open book account cases as contract cases. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Continued To Oct-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CESAR HERNANDEZ' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES is continued to October 8, 2013 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 25, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The Court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
